config.niche: Help me to find a cybersecurity company that is poised to execute on the growth coming in CMMC (Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification) but that is also not competitive with ControlCase (which I own). The company must be differentiated. There are many angles to take advantage of such as staffing and training companies for CCAs/CCPs or CMMC Level 1 Self Assessment technology tools etc etc (don't let these examples limit your logic).

chat_history.content: Find me 5 differentiated Help me to find a cybersecurity company that is poised to execute on the growth coming in CMMC (Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification) but that is also not competitive with ControlCase (which I own). The company must be differentiated. There are many angles to take advantage of such as staffing and training companies for CCAs/CCPs or CMMC Level 1 Self Assessment technology tools etc etc (don't let these examples limit your logic). companies in NCP Priority Geography (Eastern US).

Got it. I know what NCP looks for — founder-owned, differentiated, right to win, growing market, no PE on the cap table.
